summary: The diff implements REQ-1 by refactoring the letter/message panel in Envelope.tsx to use fixed positioning with transform-based centering (position: fixed, top: 50%, left: 50%, transform: translate(-50%, -50%)), and by updating the letterReveal keyframe in index.css to bake translate(-50%, -50%) into every step so the animation only affects opacity/scale — never positional properties. This directly addresses all acceptance criteria for REQ-1.

hallucinated_features.description: A clickable backdrop overlay div was added behind the letter panel that closes the envelope when clicked.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only asked for the letter panel to remain fixed and centered. It did not request any click-to-close backdrop or toggle-close behavior for the letter panel. Adding a new dismiss mechanism is beyond the stated scope.
